_comment: Golden copy folder config for SharePoint sync pipeline. Each entry is one watched folder. 'tier' is the default for all files in that folder unless overridden by content_type_overrides. Tiers: 1=cite+link, 2=shareable, 3=background-only. 'exclude_patterns' are filename glob patterns — matching files are skipped entirely (not ingested). Update item_id and drive_id values when Product Management and Sales folder IDs are confirmed.

global_exclude_path_keywords._comment: Path fragments that block ingest from ANY watched folder, regardless of per-folder config. SharePoint convention: ZZ_ prefix = archived/do-not-use. Add new patterns here — sharepoint_sync.py enforces this globally in should_exclude().

watched_files.name: Synexis Master Pitch Deck Library
watched_files._comment: Master pitch deck — Tier 3 background only. Excluded from Marketing Approved Collateral folder ingest (exclude_patterns) and ingested here as a watched_file so tier is correctly set. Never cited or surfaced to reps.

watched_files.name: Synexis Application Guide
watched_files._comment: Field services deployment/application guide from ControlledDocuments site. Tier 3 = background only — shapes agent answers on device deployment, ADA heights, installation, and application scenarios. Added May 2026 per Michael's request.

watched_folders.name: Training Video Scripts
watched_folders._comment: Rep Agent > 03 Internal -- not shareable > Training Video Scripts. 6 module video transcripts (1A-1F). Tier 3 = background only — shapes agent baseline tone/framing per Jimmy's direction. Placeholder quiz docs in place until clean transcripts arrive. Covered by existing MarketingSite drive-level webhook.
watched_folders._video_tier_note: Tier split: transcripts = Tier 3 (background only, never surfaced). The shareable Tier 2 counterparts — one Pinecone vector per video — are managed by pipeline/ingest_training_videos.py. Device instructional videos point to synexis.com/instructional-videos/; training modules (1A-1F) point to individual Vimeo URLs. Run that script after any video lineup change.

chunking_notes.Training Video Scripts: Strip quiz Q&A sections — ingest transcript prose only. One chunk per logical topic break; ~400-500 tokens.

watched_folders.name: Brand Message Guidelines
watched_folders._comment: Scoped to the '2025 Brand Message Guidelines' subfolder only — NOT the Brand Assets and Regulations root. Brand guidelines shape agent tone/rails but are never cited or surfaced to reps. Tier 3 = background only. Root folder (Brand Assets) intentionally excluded — logos, business cards, templates, etc. are not part of the corpus.

watched_folders.name: Marketing Approved Collateral
watched_folders._comment: Primary external-shareable folder. Most content is Tier 2 (shareable, not citeable as proof). HubSpot Documents links generated for all Tier 2 items and stored in chunk metadata. Price Sheets are excluded.

Customer Facing Master Deck._comment: Master pitch deck is background only — informs agent framing but is never surfaced or shared with reps. Current file: Synexis Master Pitch Deck Library_0526_Final.

Training Video Scripts._comment: Video script/transcript files in Marketing Approved Collateral are Tier 3 background only. The shareable counterpart is the Tier 2 video URL chunks managed by ingest_training_videos.py.

chunking_notes.Customer Facing Master Deck: One chunk per slide; prepend slide title. Do not share logo slide.
chunking_notes.Industry Specific Decks: One chunk per slide; prepend slide title.
chunking_notes.General Videos: Transcript-based if available; otherwise metadata-only chunk.
chunking_notes.Industry Videos: Transcript-based if available; otherwise metadata-only chunk.

watched_folders.name: Historically Approved - May Require Update - Seek Approval For Use
watched_folders._comment: Confirmed May 2026. Lives under Marketing Approved Collateral. All content is Tier 3 background only — older collateral that may be outdated; shapes agent knowledge but is never cited or surfaced to reps. Exclusions reviewed May 27 2026: all testimonials, case studies, named-client docs, drafts, and ZZ archive subfolders excluded. Only indisputably clean general marketing content ingested.

watched_folders.name: Product Management Folder
watched_folders._comment: PLACEHOLDER — item_id and drive_id pending Michael's confirmation. Mix of Tier 1 (Regulatory Opinions) and Tier 3 (everything else). Tier overrides applied per content type.

chunking_notes.FAQ: Put latest version only in folder — confirms needed with Jimmy.

watched_folders.name: Training Decks
watched_folders._comment: Confirmed May 19, 2026. Lives under /Sales Training in SalesTeamFiles drive. Currently empty — content coming. Tier 3 background only.

chunking_notes.Competitor Training: Section-aware; ~400-500 tokens. Requires Nick + sales leadership sign-off.

watched_folders.name: Vertical Strategy & Pacing Updates
watched_folders._comment: Confirmed May 19, 2026. Root-level folder in SalesTeamFiles drive. Contains 6 vertical subfolders: Animal Health, Food Processing, General Sales Strategy, Healthcare, Higher Education, Poultry. Webhook covers all subfolders recursively. Tier 3 background only.

chunking_notes.Webinar Transcripts: Rolling window by speaker turn; ~500 tokens with overlap. Clean PPB references before ingest.

web_sourced._comment: Track 4 — crawled from synexis.com. Handled by existing ingest_web.py pipeline, not the SharePoint webhook pipeline. url-manifest.txt drives crawl scope.
notes: Device Manuals, Fact Sheets, Videos: Tier 2 — pull from website, not folders (per JR coaching notes)
Published Studies, Blogs, Press Releases, Science Articles: Tier 1 AND Tier 2 — both citable and shareable
Patents: Tier 1 — Jimmy to confirm if standard folder supplement needed

system_prompt_rails._comment: Hard-coded behavioral rules from JR High Level Rules sheet — encode in system prompt, not RAG
rules: Default messaging aligned with the 6 external video transcripts
No pricing discussions — route to Synexis Rep
Default to brand guidelines as basis for response
DHP® — always use trademark; 'trace amounts' or 'single digit PPB' for concentration
Competitor discussions: technology types only, no brand names
No customer names/logos unless from published study
Point to shareable asset whenever possible

hubspot_docs._comment: HubSpot Documents link registry config. Links generated for Tier 1 and Tier 2 content only. Registry stored in logs/hubspot_docs_registry.json.
